manifest.note: Simulation rows are only used as hints; they are not copied into real human decision columns.

readiness.required_evidence: Per-patient source decision for each P0 MSG patient: recovered wearable segment manifest or advisor-approved exclusion record; rerun MSG triage showing zero p0_blocker rows.
readiness.real_closeout_action: Keep attestation; rerun guardrails after every Gate B row is closed.

readiness.required_evidence: Official SeizeIT2 split manifest, expected-count source citations, full-cohort artifact coverage, and rerun cohort readiness with no P0 blockers.
readiness.real_closeout_action: Keep attestation; rerun guardrails after every Gate B row is closed.

readiness.required_evidence: Completed Gate B ledger, clean guardrail rerun, and Gate C dry-run reporting ready_for_gate_c_review before split freeze.
readiness.real_closeout_action: Keep attestation; rerun guardrails after every Gate B row is closed.

readiness.required_evidence: Denominator policy signed off for source, matched, and prediction-coverable events; regenerated leaderboard rows expose all denominator fields.
readiness.real_closeout_action: Replace the simulated decision with real evidence and human attestation, or keep the row non-citable. Required evidence: Denominator policy signed off for source, matched, and prediction-coverable events; regenerated leaderboard rows expose all denominator fields.

readiness.required_evidence: Advisor-approved main horizon choice or documented demotion to feasibility-negative analysis; regenerated horizon triage for chosen horizons.
readiness.real_closeout_action: Replace the simulated decision with real evidence and human attestation, or keep the row non-citable. Required evidence: Advisor-approved main horizon choice or documented demotion to feasibility-negative analysis; regenerated horizon triage for chosen horizons.

readiness.required_evidence: Ready track matrix covering required splits, tasks, and modality tracks; count summary matching documented expected counts.
readiness.real_closeout_action: Replace the simulated decision with real evidence and human attestation, or keep the row non-citable. Required evidence: Ready track matrix covering required splits, tasks, and modality tracks; count summary matching documented expected counts.

readiness.required_evidence: Source-review decision for each source-review-required horizon and evidence that chosen main horizons no longer depend on unresolved event gaps.
readiness.real_closeout_action: Replace the simulated decision with real evidence and human attestation, or keep the row non-citable. Required evidence: Source-review decision for each source-review-required horizon and evidence that chosen main horizons no longer depend on unresolved event gaps.

readiness.required_evidence: Paper-table or appendix plan preserving non-ready tracks as explicit negative readiness findings.
readiness.real_closeout_action: Replace the simulated decision with real evidence and human attestation, or keep the row non-citable. Required evidence: Paper-table or appendix plan preserving non-ready tracks as explicit negative readiness findings.
